summary: Iteration 101: Tested link click tracking feature and related UI changes. Backend tests confirm (1) GET /api/contacts/{user_id}/{contact_id}/stats returns 'link_clicks' field, (2) Short URL redirect at /api/s/{short_code} returns 302. Frontend tests confirm (1) Contact detail stats bar shows 5 stats including 'clicks', (2) 'Share Business Card' title removed from share modal, (3) Activity feed displays new event type labels like 'Viewed Congrats Card', 'Link Page Shared'.

backend.test_contact_stats_returns_link_clicks_f: PASS - link_clicks field present in stats response
backend.test_business_card_short_url: PASS - Business card short URL created
backend.test_review_page_short_url: PASS - Review page short URL created

frontend.stats_bar_5_stats: PASS - Found all 5 stats: touches, msgs, campaigns, referrals, clicks (screenshot shows 51 touches · 27 msgs · 0 campaigns · 0 referrals · 0 clicks)
frontend.share_modal_title_removed: PASS - 'Share Business Card' title NOT found in contact page modal (correctly removed)
frontend.thread_share_modal_title_removed: PASS - 'Share Business Card' title NOT found in thread page (correctly removed)
frontend.activity_feed_event_labels: PASS - Activity feed displays new event types like 'Viewed Congrats Card', 'Link Page Shared'

critical_code_review_comments: Backend: link_clicks field properly counts events with types digital_card_viewed, review_page_viewed, showcase_viewed, link_page_viewed, link_clicked, review_link_clicked, congrats_card_viewed (lines 471-477 in contact_events.py)
Backend: _log_link_click_event helper correctly detects event types and logs to contact_events collection (lines 140-188 in short_urls.py)
Frontend: EVENT_TYPE_LABELS in both contact/[id].tsx and activity.tsx include the new viewed event types
Frontend: ContactStats interface includes link_clicks field (line 63 in contact/[id].tsx)
Frontend: Stats bar heroStatsLine renders 5 stat chips including clicks (lines 1454-1479 in contact/[id].tsx)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Link click tracking feature fully implemented and tested. Stats endpoint returns link_clicks, short URL redirect works with 302, contact detail shows 5 stats (touches, msgs, campaigns, referrals, clicks), share modal title 'Share Business Card' removed, activity feed displays new event types. Polling interval for activity feed is 15 seconds.

mocked_api.twilio_sms: MOCKED - Twilio SMS is mocked, personal SMS flow opens native SMS app
